title: Ukrainian-Style Pirozhki
description: Flaky pastry pockets filled with a savory robust Ukrainian-inspired filling. Perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Robust Ukrainian Meat Filling (beef, pork, onion, carrot, mushroom, dill)

instructions: On a lightly floured surface, roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a small bowl, mix together the robust Ukrainian meat filling, egg, salt, and black pepper.
Place a tablespoon of the meat mixture in the center of each pastry circle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with water, then fold the pastry over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape.
Press the edges of the pastry together to seal the pirozhki.
Place the pirozhki on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the pirozhki with a little water, then sprinkle with a pinch of salt.
Bake the pirozhki in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the pirozhki warm, garnished with chopped fresh dill if desired.
